para_trans: Dharavi Koliwada in Mumbai city district
Government to finalise CMAN
Committee formed to make recommendations
about doing it.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
Government Decision Number: E-1621605 / Geo-assessment
First Floor, Main Building, Ministry,
Madame Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk, Mumbai-400 032.
Date: 15 April 2026.
Reference: - Government Decision, Revenue & Forest Department No. Narrow-2012 / P.No.272 / L-1,
Dated November 20, 2012
The Proposal: -
Determination of procedures and guidelines for demarcation of Koliwadas in Brihanmumbai
A 6-member committee was formed for the purpose. Deputy Director of Land Records, Konkan
Pradesh, Mumbai was made the controller of the committee. Mumbai city district
To determine the boundary of the Koliwadas, the Koliwadas were counted on a physical site.
Objections raised by various authorities to the enumeration map prepared in connection with the census
are not found. The Collector, Mumbai City submitted a report to the government in this regard.
to hear and decide on the relevant objections in pursuance of the said report.
The District Collector, Mumbai City, was informed.
Counting prepared to demarcate the boundary of Dharavi Koliwada
The map has been objected to by the Dharavi Redevelopment Project (Slum Rehabilitation Authority).
He also interacted with local respected public representatives and Koli community organizations on the subject. the Minister
(Revenue) under the Chairmanship of Shri. The meeting was held on 08.04.2026. At the meeting
Objections received for recognition of Bi-symmetrics in the map of Koliwada
The Divisional Commissioner, Konkan, to take appropriate action and make recommendations in this regard.
The formation of a committee under the chairmanship of the government was under consideration.
The Government's Decisions:
By conducting a physical survey of Dharavi Koliwada in Mumbai city district in 2018.
The boundary shown in the enumeration map prepared by the Collector, Mumbai City Office remains the same.
The committee is being constituted as follows.
The functions of the Committee:
1) Dharavi created in 2018 by the Collectorate, Mumbai City Office
Recommendation in line with the finalization of the seismic count map of Koliwada.
2) The objections received on this counting map are those of the concerned objectors / kolis.
Listening to the representatives of the organizations and coming to a final conclusion.
3) With regard to the demarcation of Koliwadas, under the chairmanship of the Additional Chief Secretary (Revenue).
d. Consideration of the proceedings in respect of the directions of the meeting held on 7/10/2024.
4) The committee will be allowed to include some other issues in the inquiry.
3. Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation, Collector, Mumbai City, as required by the said Committee.
Office as well as documents related to Dharavi Koliwada from Dharavi Redevelopment Project
can be requested. Similarly, physical sightseeing can be done as per requirement.
The Chairman of the Committee shall be specially invited by such officer / s as he may deem fit.
Power to invite retired officers or experts to the meeting of the Committee.
are being provided. The Committee submitted its self-explanatory report with recommendations 03.
be submitted to the government within a period of months.
5. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
